chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1306 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 6493/2020 For hearing of main case 26.05.2022 Petitioner seeks cancellation of 4 sale deeds after being declared as illegal and unlawful with further prayer that private respondents No.3 to 7 be inquired. We are afraid that the registered instrument cannot be brushed aside or cancelled in a summary proceedings under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Petitioner if claimed any vested interest in the property may invoke the jurisdiction of civil court for the Redressal of his grievance. Petition for the above score being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
